operational_scenes.primary_intent: Explain battery charging behavior and quick charge thresholds
operational_intents: Explain charging speed at low battery levels
Highlight importance of maintaining charger activation

operational_scenes.scene_title: Charger Usage and Site Management Considerations
operational_scenes.primary_intent: Discuss charger management on different site sizes and potential issues
operational_intents: Emphasize turning chargers back on after removal
Explain impact of limited chargers on charging time
Warn about consequences of forgetting to enable chargers
operational_scenes.knowledge_extraction_strategy: Extract operational best practices for charger management
operational_scenes.why_this_strategy: Capture site-specific charger usage and troubleshooting advice
